caption: A group of men associated with Real Madrid, indicated by the club's crest in the top corner of each frame, walk through an outdoor area. Initially, several men in dark blue suits and face masks descend a small set of stairs from a building, with one man carrying a black bag. As the scene progresses, the perspective shifts to a wider view of a paved area where a larger group of men, including those in suits and others wearing grey t-shirts and dark pants, walk toward the camera. Some of the men in grey shirts wear black face masks and backpacks. In the background, a white aircraft is partially visible, parked near a terminal building under a clear blue sky. The men move steadily forward in a coordinated group, transitioning from the building's exit toward the open tarmac.
